docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $956.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT CYNTHIA JOHNSON. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE CASE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
